segments.text: Enough hits done after that forward air, allowing Kameme to answer with a forward air of his own.
Tosses the bike up, Crash Bomber on the side, and he actually managed to recover a good amount of health from that too.
I'm going to note that's what they love to do, but he's slapping them out.

full_text: Enough hits done after that forward air, allowing Kameme to answer with a forward air of his own. Tosses the bike up, Crash Bomber on the side, and he actually managed to recover a good amount of health from that too. I'm going to note that's what they love to do, but he's slapping them out.
